Name: iMaxNumFailedAutoRestarts
Description: Prevents a restart loop if the server crashes on startup.

Name: fMinTimeForSuccessfulAutoRestart
Description: The minimum server uptime at which a restart is considered successful and the restart counter is reset.

Name: bLogIPs
Description: Logs ip with player's connect and disconnect.

Name: bAutoSplitModuleConsoleCommands
Description: Automatically splits the console command by spaces and puts strings into registers for wse_console_command_received script.

Name: bAdvancedLogFormat
Description: Uses advanced log format instead standart Warband's. More convenient for parsing logs.
